message:
feat(core): add guardrails, diagnostics, and fast-path probes for latency instrumentation (ft-2p9cb.1.2.2)

Guardrails: CorrelationContext.validate() detects empty runs, duplicate stages,
clock regressions. InstrumentationError enum with structured reason codes.
Degradation ladder: Full → SkipOverhead → SkipCorrelation → Passthrough based
on overhead budget multiples. InstrumentedEnforcer gains diagnostic(), is_healthy(),
status_line(), process_validated_run(). FastProbe: zero-alloc Copy probe for
high-frequency stages. 27 new tests (123 total), all 34 proptests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
